audience: therapists and private practice owners with newsletters

offer.title: Private Practice Newsletter Benchmark + Template Kit
offer.positioning: A therapist newsletter checkup buyers can use immediately without hiring a marketer.
offer.corePromise: Show therapists how their newsletter compares to niche norms, identify likely weak spots, and provide templates to improve performance.

risks: generic or weak benchmark data reduces credibility
overly marketer-style messaging may reduce trust
positioning too close to legal or clinical advice creates risk
recommendation: Build the benchmark-first product and use templates as the action layer.
